# Shafira Resort

> Family beach resort on Memit Beach, Morella village, Leihitu District, Central Maluku, Indonesia — on the quiet north coast of Ambon Island, about one hour's drive from Ambon city. Direct WhatsApp booking with the owner, no middlemen.

Shafira Resort is a small seaside resort for families and groups looking for a
quiet beach stay in Ambon / Maluku: clear emerald water, a purple wooden pier
with gazebos over the sea, snorkeling right off the beach, and sunsets visible
from the shoreline gazebos.

## Facts

- Location: Memit Beach, Morella village (Negeri Morella), Leihitu District, Central Maluku Regency, Maluku, Indonesia
- Coordinates: -3.5119, 128.2344 (plus code F6QM+6QG) — https://maps.google.com/?q=-3.5119,128.2344
- Booking: WhatsApp +62 852-4376-2626 (direct with the owner)
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/resortsafiramemit/
- Open 24 hours for staying guests

## Rooms & Rates (per night, IDR)

- Grand Villa (Vila Besar): Rp1,500,000 — up to 8 guests, 2 large bedrooms, private gazebo. For families and groups.
- Double Room (Kamar): Rp500,000 — 2 guests, private bathroom. For couples.
- Beach Glamping: Rp350,000 — 2–3 guests, tent on the beach with mattress, lighting, and power.

## Facilities

Free-use boat, beachfront gazebos, canteen, full cooking kit (gas stove and
cookware — bring fish from the market and grill it), fast Starlink satellite
internet across the resort.

## Nearby

- Lubang Buaya Beach (± 10 min): Morella's famous snorkeling/diving spot
- Air Belanda Spring (± 15 min): freshwater spring flowing into the sea
- Kapahaha Fortress (± 30 min uphill walk): historic hilltop site
- Liang / Hunimua Beach (± 30 min): white-sand beach once ranked among Indonesia's most beautiful

## Pages

- Homepage (Indonesian): https://shafira-resort.vercel.app/
- Homepage (English): https://shafira-resort.vercel.app/en
- Rooms & rates (Indonesian): https://shafira-resort.vercel.app/akomodasi
- Rooms & rates (English): https://shafira-resort.vercel.app/en/accommodation

## Ringkasan (Bahasa Indonesia)

Shafira Resort adalah resort pantai keluarga di Pantai Memit, Negeri Morella,
Maluku Tengah — resort tepi laut yang tenang di pesisir utara Pulau Ambon,
sekitar satu jam dari Kota Ambon. Cocok sebagai tempat healing di Ambon:
menginap di vila (Rp1.500.000/malam), kamar (Rp500.000/malam), atau glamping
(Rp350.000/malam), dengan perahu bebas pakai, gazebo, snorkeling, peralatan
masak, dan internet Starlink. Pemesanan langsung ke pemilik via WhatsApp
+62 852-4376-2626.
